items.body:
## Documentation Gap **Package:** `Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding` **Service directory:** `sdk/contentunderstanding/Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding/` **Triggered by:** commit 10f785bbe243a80d4f4608dc0d6eb477185eb27b (PR #58166) by `@chienyuanchang` ## What Changed PR #58166 added: - New `AnalyzeUsageDetails` class exposing billing and token consumption details from completed analyze operations (document page counts, audio/video hours, contextualization tokens, per-model LLM/embedding token dictionary) - New `AnalyzeOperationExtensions.GetUsage()` extension method to retrieve `AnalyzeUsageDetails` from a completed `Operation` - Updated `Sample03_AnalyzeInvoice.md` with a "Get usage details" section and `ContentUnderstandingGetUsage` snippet - Updated `tests/samples/Sample03_AnalyzeInvoice.cs` with the corresponding `#region Snippet:ContentUnderstandingGetUsage` / `#endregion` block The main **README.md** was **not** updated and does not mention the new class or extension method at all. ## Gaps Found - `AnalyzeUsageDetails` is not listed in the **Main classes** section of `README.md` - `AnalyzeOperationExtensions.GetUsage()` is not referenced anywhere in `README.md` - The **Examples** section of `README.md` describes Sample 03 as "Domain-Specific Analysis — Extract structured fields from invoices" but does not mention that Sample 03 now also demonstrates retrieving usage/billing details - No snippet placeholder for `ContentUnderstandingGetUsage` exists in `README.md`, even though the snippet is already defined in the test file and shown in the sample markdown
📐 Implementation Guide This section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above. ### Step 1: Modify files **Edit** `sdk/contentunderstanding/Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding/README.md` **Change 1 — Main classes section:** Add `AnalyzeUsageDetails` to the "Main classes" list. Find the existing block: ```markdown ### Main classes * **`ContentUnderstandingClient`** - The main client for analyzing content, as well as creating, managing, and configuring analyzers * **`AnalysisResult`** - Contains the structured results of an analysis operation, including content elements, markdown, and metadata ``` Replace with: ```markdown ### Main classes * **`ContentUnderstandingClient`** - The main client for analyzing content, as well as creating, managing, and configuring analyzers * **`AnalysisResult`** - Contains the structured results of an analysis operation, including content elements, markdown, and metadata * **`AnalyzeUsageDetails`** - Contains billing and token consumption details from a completed analyze operation. Retrieve via `AnalyzeOperationExtensions.GetUsage()` on a completed `Operation`. ``` **Change 2 — Examples section:** Update the Sample 03 bullet to mention usage/billing details. Find: ```markdown * **Domain-Specific Analysis** - Extract structured fields from invoices using `prebuilt-invoice` ``` Replace with: ```markdown * **Domain-Specific Analysis** - Extract structured fields from invoices using `prebuilt-invoice`, and retrieve usage/billing details (page counts, token consumption) via `AnalyzeOperationExtensions.GetUsage()` ``` ### Step 2: Add or update code snippets The `ContentUnderstandingGetUsage` snippet is already defined in the test file at: `sdk/contentunderstanding/Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding/tests/samples/Sample03_AnalyzeInvoice.cs` The snippet is bounded by `#region Snippet:ContentUnderstandingGetUsage` / `#endregion`. **No new test code is needed.** The only change needed is adding the placeholder to README.md. Add a new subsection in the README under the **Examples** heading (e.g., after the existing "Analyze content" bullet list) or within the "Key concepts" / "Asynchronous operations" section. Insert: ```markdown ### Retrieve usage and billing details After an analyze operation completes, use `GetUsage()` to retrieve token and page consumption: ```C# Snippet:ContentUnderstandingGetUsage ``` ``` > The `Update-Snippets.ps1` script will populate this placeholder automatically. ### Step 3: Verify README structure The README already contains all required sections (Getting started, Key concepts, Examples, Troubleshooting, Next steps, Contributing). No structural changes are needed beyond the targeted additions above. ### Step 4: Validate Run these commands in order: 1. `dotnet build sdk/contentunderstanding/Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding/` 2. `dotnet test sdk/contentunderstanding/Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding/ --filter TestCategory!=Live` 3. `eng/scripts/Update-Snippets.ps1 contentunderstanding` — confirm that the `ContentUnderstandingGetUsage` placeholder in README.md is replaced with the code from `Sample03_AnalyzeInvoice.cs` 4. `eng/scripts/Export-API.ps1 contentunderstanding` — no public API changes are expected, but run to confirm the listing files are up to date 5. `dotnet format sdk/contentunderstanding/Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding/`
## Next Steps > [!TIP] > **Ready for automated implementation?** Assign this issue to **`@copilot`** to have Copilot coding agent implement the changes described in the Implementation Guide above
items.title: [ContentUnderstanding] Docs: Document AnalyzeUsageDetails and GetUsage() in README
